title: koeleria macrantha subsp. macrantha
intro: Koeleria macrantha subsp. macrantha, also known as tall blue grama, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria macrantha subsp. macrantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to harness its medicinal benefits and provide relief from various health issues.
